event_name: From Weekly Play to Prereleases to Set Championships, there are a multitude of events that bring the magic of Disney Lorcana TCG gameplay to a store near you.

We encourage you to enroll your store on the Ravensburger Play Hub. As a retailer, you’ll enjoy access to intuitive event creation and management tools. This makes events like Weekly Play, Prerelease, Set Championships, Core Constructed, Pack Rush, and more easier for you and your players.
Commander Party – Magic: The Gathering® | Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Standard Showdown – Magic: The Gathering® | Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Two-Headed Giant Commander Night – Magic: The Gathering® | Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Championship Regionals are battle events to decide the No.1 player in the region.
Store Treasure Cups bring the excitement and prizes of Treasure Cups to selected local game stores.
The ONE PIECE CARD GAME Treasure Cup is a year-round tournament !
- Canada has its first Regional Qualifier!
- Our first APAC region Regional Qualifier takes place! Note, these dates are local time, and for many of you Australia is a fair bit ahead on the clock.
- The earliest players might participate in the Summoner Skirmish for July.
- The earliest your LGS can run the first Summoner Skirmish events after Spiritforged launch
- The earliest your LGS can run the second post-Spiritforged Summoner Skirmish event.
- The final Regional Qualifier of 2026, we had to bring it to Riot’s hometown.
- This is the earliest stores can run the first Summoner Skirmish event after Unleash’s release.
Before we get to the full year’s content, we know players are eager to see the full line-up for Regional Qualifiers (RQs) we have planned for the year.
Bologna takes center stage as Italy hosts its first-ever Riftbound Regional Qualifier.
Las Vegas steps into the spotlight as Riftbound returns to the U.S. for the next Regional Qualifier.
Mid-May - China’s Unleashed Minor Tournaments begin

Welcome Riftbounders, 2026 has a lot coming and we wanted to give players a look at as much of it as we can! From Set release dates, to Regional Qualifiers, to Conventions, here’s everything we felt we could jam into this with high confidence.
